name: Maxtor Corporation
description: Maxtor Corporation was a prominent American computer hard disk drive manufacturer founded in 1982. Headquartered in California, the company became the third-largest hard disk drive manufacturer in the world, specializing in the design and production of high-capacity magnetic storage solutions for personal computers and enterprise systems. Maxtor was widely recognized for its innovation in the storage industry before being acquired by Seagate Technology in 2006. Although the original corporation ceased independent operations following the acquisition, the Maxtor name was later utilized as a brand for external storage products.
